changes: getAdminRank now returns a `{ rank = true }` set on every framework (ESX, QBCore, Qbox) so consumers can use `rank[name] == true` uniformly.
Update lyre_garage alongside this release to restore admin commands on QBCore.
Add skillcheck module with an ox_lib provider (bridge.skillcheck.run).
Make sure to update every Lyre resource alongside this release. The previous one was broken.
Add startup version check against lyrescripts/versions.
Expose bridge integrations, shared imports, and automatic SQL migrations for Lyre resources.
